content.full_text:
July 27, 1976

Bruce Bloomfield
c/o General Delivery
San Jose, California 95113

Dear Mr. Bloomfield:

This letter is in response to your request for information
relating to the June 1976 primary election in California.

The financial disclosure requirements of the Political
Reform Act do not apply to candidates for federal office, and
I am advised by the Federal Elections Commission in Washington,
D.C. that federal law does not require personal financial dis-
closure by candidates either.

I have requested that the Secretary of State's office send
to you directly a list of the California delegates to this
year's Democratic National Convention. There is no charge for
the list.

If our staff can be of further assistance, please contact
us.

Sincerely,

Nan Hambleton
Special Compliance Representative

NH:bw

bcc: Jeanne P.

[The image shows a pink/faded document with typewritten text that is difficult to read clearly due to the color and quality. Most of the text is illegible or too faint to transcribe accurately. There appear to be several paragraphs of text, with what looks like a signature or closing at the bottom, and what might be a date notation, but the specific content cannot be reliably made out with confidence.]

Fair Political Prac. Comm.

July, 1976
[illegible]

What is the cost of the Statement of Economics of
the presidential candidates in the Cal. Primary, 76?
For Carter, Brown, and Ford.

Also, can you send me a list of the names of the Cal.
delegates to the Democrat Convention this year,
arranged by candidate? Is there a fee?

Bruce Bloomfield
c/o General Delivery
San Jose, Cal. 95109
95113

[illegible]

[illegible]

[The image appears to be a heavily faded or degraded photocopy/scan of a document. The text is extremely difficult to read due to poor contrast and quality. Only fragments of text are barely visible in the upper portion of the page, but they are too illegible to transcribe with confidence. The majority of the page appears blank or contains text that is completely illegible.]

The financial disclosure requirements of the Political Reform Act do not apply to candidates for federal office, and I am advised by the Federal Elections Commission in Washington, D.C. that federal law does not require personal financial disclosure by candidates either. I have requested that the Secretary of State's office send to you directly a list of the California delegates to this year's Democratic National Convention. There is no charge for the list. If our staff can be of further assistance, please contact us. Sincerely, Nan Hambleton Special Compliance Representative NH:bw bcc: Jeanne P. Dear Mr. Bloomfield: This letter is in response to your request for information. I write to the June 1979 District Election in California. The following questions refer to the following: D. O. state legislature law does not require personal property give- Reform Act do not apply to ownership of jewelry or fine art I am writing because I am interested in the Legislative Committee in Washington, Please be considerate enough to send me a copy of state, a little early I have received your copy so far, a little early Best, a Democratic National Convention. There is no chance for you personally to help If not able can be of further assistance please contact Sincerely, Man Implosion Special Committee Reference Files 1976 July, 2028786 Fair Political Prac. Comm. What is the cost of the Statement of Economics of the presidential candidates in the Cal. Primary, 76? For Carter, Brown, and Ford. Also, can you send me a list of the names of the Cal. delegates to the Democrat Convention this year, arranged by candidate? Is there a fee? Bruce Bloomfield c/o General Delivery San Jose, Cal. 95108 95113 The image provided is extremely faint and mostly illegible, with very little visible text or content that can be reliably transcribed. Only a few scattered letters and numbers are partially visible, but the majority of the page appears to be blank or nearly so. If you have another scan or a higher quality image, please provide it for better results.
